revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) FLIP the reactive/fabrication read at 00:10 — the 'annual checkup' framing is at least as consistent with deliberate soft-legitimacy strategy as with knowledge-gap fabrication. Remove 'fabrication' language; reframe as low-confidence execution of a legitimacy opener. The coaching implication shifts from ethics to delivery quality. (2) CORRECT two codex misreferences: cherry_pick_moments[2] cites verify.interest_in_solar incorrectly (correct: protocols.time_constraint + analysis_directives.customer_state_trajectory); cherry_pick_moments[1] cites intros.tesla incorrectly for a non-Tesla-sourced call (correct: intros.standard). (3) ADD two missed cherry_pick moments: (a) the unannounced 40-second hold at 00:29 as a time_burn/customer_experience_gap with a protocols.time_constraint coaching note for driving-customer hold management; (b) the warm sign-off at 01:18 as a corrective data point that contradicts the 'warm → neutral' state_delta — the customer's goodwill was preserved, which should temper the severity of the state_changes read. Additionally, reconsider handoff_brief.applicable=false: even on a transfer call, a minimal pre-transfer context note for Joel is within scope of handoff_brief_discipline and analysis_directives.handoff_brief_generation.
